title: Mildly Yeasty Italian Pomegranate Ragu
description: A comforting Italian ragu featuring pomegranate and a hint of yeast, perfect for a sick day. This dish is anti-inflammatory friendly and made in a kadhai.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a kadhai over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the active dry yeast and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the pomegranate juice, salt, dried basil, and dried oregano, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the canned crushed tomatoes and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the kadhai from the heat and stir in the pomegranate seeds.
Let the ragu cool to room temperature, then refrigerate or serve hot.
Before serving, salt-bake the kadhai in a preheated oven at 300 degrees for 10 minutes to enhance the flavors.
